story.text:
# ✨ Attest Memo
**✍️ → 🕰️(block-bound) → 🔏**
*memora · inscription · V41*

Attest authorship and time of a chronicle entry. Memora's attestation pairs with Pallia's cloak to form bilateral authorship.

> The chronicle says what; the attestation says when and by whom. Together they make a claim a city may keep.

*Keywords:* attest · authorship · time · v5
